name: Sam Altman
intel_notes:
Openly gay; came out publicly at age 17, advocated for “Safe Space” support in school

Known prepper: collects survival gear, owns a retreat in Big Sur, holds guns and gold and preparedness supplies

Married Oliver Mulherin in January 2024; became a father in February 2025, describing being “neurochemically hacked” by the experience

Charitably committed via Giving Pledge since mid‑2024. Investor in Reddit, Airbnb, Helion Energy, Hydrazine Capital, among many others (portfolio of ~400 companies, net worth ~$1.7–1.8B as of early 2025)

Advocates for cautious but ambitious AI development, universal basic income (“basic compute”), and regenerative policies like land value tax. Engaged in political fundraising across lines, self-describes as “politically homeless” as of July 2025

name: Paige Hendrix Buckner
intel_notes:
Intro via Susan Lyne to explore Gwyneth Paltrow speaking at All Raise VC Summit (Moj representing on Gwyneth’s behalf).

Moj offered to send Kinship Ventures deck + data room (includes their origin story + investment focus).

Moj is a long-time supporter of All Raise, close to Jess Lee from the founding days.

Requested more info: past speakers, event programming, and a potential attendee list to help prepare.

Moj prefers streamlined comms — one thread w/ Paige, Gwyneth, and team.

Paige + Elise (SVP Marketing at All Raise) offered a 15-min prep call to support Gwyneth participation ask.

Event audience: 300+ senior women & nonbinary VCs, select LPs, allies — high-trust, off-the-record vibe.

Notable speakers: Dr. Jill Biden, execs from Anthropic, Spark Capital, Sequoia, Greylock, etc.

custom_fields.Job Description: Leads All Raise, a nonprofit organization committed to advancing women and non-binary individuals in venture capital; previously served as interim CEO and Chief of Staff; helped scale programs like VC Cohorts, VC Champions, Black & Latinx Media Mastery, and the Miami Chapter

name: Deon Nicholas
intel_notes:
Former CEO, now Board Chairman at Forethought.

Building a new AI productivity assistant; early prototype ready, fundraising pre-seed round soon.

Strong existing relationship with Moj and Kinship from past Forethought work; interested in Kinship as early investors and early users.

Intro call set for Sept 8; Moj may demo Trolley AI and get Deon’s feedback.

Project is confidential; no public announcements yet.

custom_fields.Job Description: Deon Nicholas co‑founded Forethought, an "agentic AI platform for customer experience."
